title: Source allowlist + license register (initial sources verified + dated; redistributionAllowed flags)
context: Source allowlist + license register for Ewing-Biomarker-Evidence-Cards, the M0 companion to the compliance policy spec (-compliance-001) and the second hard-gate build item. It is the single machine-readable record of which sources may be reused and how. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Build the source allowlist and license register: every approved source recorded with its access tier, license, redistributionAllowed flag, attribution requirement, and dated verification, such that ingestion tooling can pull only from allowlisted sources and an off-allowlist source in provenance fails the build.
acceptanceCriteria: Each source recorded with: name, type, access tier (open/aggregate/de-identified only), license, redistributionAllowed, attribution requirement, verification date, verifier

dbGaP/EGA/biobanks/individual-level sources are absent by guardrail; COSMIC/OncoKB marked redistributionAllowed:false (cite-only); CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY-4.0, ClinVar/dbSNP public domain, PMC-OA per-article
Ingestion tooling can only pull from allowlisted sources; an allowlist test fails the build if an off-allowlist source appears in provenance
output: sources/allowlist.json plus sources/license-register.md (dated, per-source license records)
